paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.78, with a change of 10.7 percent compared to the prior close, and a change of -24.47 percent over the last 21 trading sessions.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from TradingView, announcing that Fermi Inc. will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings in the feed, including 1 Form 4 filing and 18 proxy solicitation filings, with recent filings including a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K filings, one of which disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson and another which announced the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.
